title: 企业使用 AI Agent 的法律风险与治理边界
title_en: Legal risks and governance boundaries for enterprise AI agents

illustrations.title: 首图：AI Agent 治理边界
illustrations.concept: 企业需要给 AI Agent 建立清晰的角色、权限和责任边界
illustrations.concept_en: Enterprises need clear roles, permissions, and accountability boundaries for AI agents.
illustrations.chapter_claim_en: Agent governance starts by making roles and responsibility boundaries visible before automation expands.
illustrations.visual_thesis_en: A large central governance block holds several blank role cards in clear lanes, with one blue-gray boundary band acting as the semantic hinge.
illustrations.support_structure_en: three nearby blank role cards and a single connected permission dot cluster
illustrations.final_prompt_en: A wide center-safe article cover showing one large governance block as an object-card, with blank role cards arranged in calm lanes and a thick blue-gray boundary band crossing the middle as the structural hinge.

illustrations.position: 一、为什么 Agent 风险不同于普通工具
illustrations.title: 自主行动带来的风险放大
illustrations.concept: AI Agent 会持续感知、调用工具并执行动作，风险从单次输出扩展到连续行为
illustrations.concept_en: AI agents continuously perceive, use tools, and act, turning one-off output risk into continuous behavior risk.
illustrations.chapter_claim_en: Continuous action changes risk from a single output problem into an operating loop problem.
illustrations.visual_thesis_en: A repeated sensing-and-action loop grows around one highlighted risk signal instead of a single isolated output card.
illustrations.support_structure_en: one loop, one tool block, and one highlighted signal
illustrations.final_prompt_en: A horizontal mechanism illustration with a large continuous loop around a tool block, one highlighted blue-gray risk signal on the loop, and a small output card nearby, showing risk amplification through repeated action.

illustrations.title: 准入与权限边界
illustrations.concept: 关键系统和敏感数据应设置准入、审批和审计机制
illustrations.concept_en: Critical systems and sensitive data need access gates, approval checks, and audit trails.

illustrations.position: 三、证据留存与责任追踪
illustrations.title: 行为日志与证据链
illustrations.concept: Agent 的输入、工具调用、输出和人工确认应形成可追溯证据链
illustrations.concept_en: Agent inputs, tool calls, outputs, and human confirmations should form a traceable evidence chain.

illustrations.title: 从试点到制度化治理
illustrations.concept: 从试点清单、权限矩阵、复盘机制逐步搭建制度化治理
illustrations.concept_en: A pilot list, permission matrix, and review mechanism can gradually become institutional governance.
